title: senecio tricephalus
intro: Senecio tricephalus, also known as the three-headed ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever, due to its expectorant and antipyretic properties. Senecio tricephalus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
